twitter_thread: Tested 25 heat-beating gadgets, only 7 worked. Top 3:
Mister with 10ft hose cools 500sqft in 5 minutes, $30
Solar-powered fans are 30% less efficient than $15 plug-in fans
$50 evaporative towel outperforms $200 vest in 95°F heat
Temporal artery thermometer detects heat stroke 3min faster than oral
Radiant barrier reflects 90% of sun's heat, saves $100/month on AC
pack.linkedin: Of the 25 heat-beating gadgets I've tested, only 7 delivered results. A mister with a 10ft hose can cool 500sqft of outdoor space in just 5 minutes for $30. In contrast, a $50 evaporative cooling towel outperformed a $200 cooling vest in 95°F heat. What's your most effective strategy for staying cool, and what gadgets have you found to be a waste of money?
tiktok_hooks: I tested 25 heat-beating gadgets and found 18 were complete waste
This $30 mister can cool your entire patio in 5 minutes
Don't fall for $200 cooling vests, a $50 towel is just as effective
pack.reddit_headline: 18 out of 25 heat-beating gadgets I tested were useless, here are the ones that actually work
